---
title: "Who Bears the Blame for AI in Peer Reviews?"
description: "Quoting Elen Le Foll on research papers exposing AI-generated peer reviews — should we blame the authors, or the reviewers/publications?"
author: "synesis"
date: "2024-03-15"
categories: [NLP, generative AI, research, ethics, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Elen Le Foll on Mastodon. Image: LinkedIn / fediscience.org. ([Source](https://fediscience.org/@ElenLeFoll/112101044743733580))](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Should we blame the authors, or should we blame the reviewers/publications?

*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_elen-le-foll-elenlefoll-activity-7174624268310261760-eW0M).*
